description: §40.1.1 — an app with no auth gate declares no redirect target, so the login-missing structural-gap check has nothing to resolve and W-AUTH-LOGIN-MISSING does not fire. The clean control: the warning is gated on a gate naming an unresolved redirect.
rationale: §40.1.1: with no auth gate there is no redirect target (firstRedirectGate stays null), so the tier-2 condition `firstRedirectGate != null && !anyResolved && unresolvedTargets.size > 0` is false and W-AUTH-LOGIN-MISSING stays silent.
